description: Retrieves the top best-selling products from the shopping admin panel, with optional year filter and limit.

evaluation.validation_summary: Ctx2Skill-lite preview verifier contract. External corpus parse/audit keeps this ephemeral until a human approves import.

implementation.prompt_template: Navigate to the best-selling products report. If a year is specified, apply filter for year {year}. If a category is specified, apply category filter to {category}. Ensure results are sorted by sales volume descending. Retrieve the top {limit} products and extract their names (and sales volume if available).

limit.description: The number of top products to retrieve (e.g., 2, 3, 5)

year.description: The year to filter by (e.g., '2022' or '2023')

postconditions: Top products are extracted and returned as specified.
preconditions: User must be logged into the shopping admin site with admin privileges.

name: get_top_selling_products_trajectory_webarena_04_3

challenges.expected_evidence: A list of 3 product names matching the expected top sellers for 2023 based on available data.
challenges.failure_signal: More or fewer than 3 products, wrong year, unsorted results, or products from other years.
rubric: Extract exactly the top 3 product names.
challenges.task: From the shopping admin, retrieve the top 3 best-selling products for the year 2023.

challenges.expected_evidence: The name of the single top-selling electronic product in 2022.
challenges.failure_signal: Product from wrong category, missing year filter, or incorrect sorting.
challenges.task: From the shopping admin, retrieve the best-selling product in the 'Electronics' category for 2022.

challenges.expected_evidence: A list of 5 product names representing the all-time top sellers.
challenges.failure_signal: More or fewer than 5 products, presence of year filter, or unsorted results.
rubric: Ensure no year filter is applied.
Extract exactly the top 5 product names.
challenges.task: From the shopping admin, retrieve the overall top 5 best-selling products without any year filter.

apis_tools: Web page navigation and interaction (clicks, dropdowns, table reading).
constraints: Must be logged in with admin credentials.
Data must be restricted to the year 2022.
Sorting must be by sales metric to identify best-sellers.
examples: No explicit examples provided in trajectory.
facts: There is a best-selling products report or page.
Sorting by sales volume or revenue is available.
procedures: Load the configured WebArena start URL/environment.
Navigate to or locate the best-selling products report.
Apply a filter for the year 2022.
Sort the results by sales volume or revenue in descending order.
context_pack.summary: Navigate to the shopping admin site, log in, access the best-selling products report, filter by year 2022, sort by sales volume/revenue descending, and extract the top 2 products.

ctx2skill_evidence.demo_scope: P0/P1 demo-paper implementation; not full long-horizon self-play training.

judge_results.rationale: Ctx2Skill-lite replay score meets the demo threshold.

selected_candidate.name: get_top_selling_products
postconditions: Top products are extracted and returned as specified.
preconditions: User must be logged into the shopping admin site with admin privileges.
selected_candidate.prompt_template: Navigate to the best-selling products report. If a year is specified, apply filter for year {year}. If a category is specified, apply category filter to {category}. Ensure results are sorted by sales volume descending. Retrieve the top {limit} products and extract their names (and sales volume if available).

ctx2skill_evidence.selected_reason: The candidate 'get_top_selling_products' directly addresses the core pattern from the trajectory: filtering by year, sorting, and extracting top products. It is flexible with optional category and variable limit, making it reusable for similar tasks. The score reflects its high relevance and expected cross-time replay success for e-commerce admin data retrieval tasks.
